repo.name: lax
repo.description: Lossless code formatters that adjust only whitespace, so they never reject or rewrite your code. CSS/SCSS/Less, SQL, and HTML/XML/SVG/Vue…

repo.name: normalize.css
repo.description: A modern alternative to CSS resets
